name: Shiitake mushrooms with wilted spinach
intro: Baby spinach is quickly wilted in a flavorful dressing of shiitake mushrooms accented with walnuts, Dijon mustard, and tangy apple cider vinegar. Add some cooked quinoa for a hearty dinner.

ingredients.item: pkg. shiitake mushrooms, stems removed and thinly sliced
small red onion, halved and thinly sliced
salt and freshly ground black pepper

method: Heat the sesame oil in a medium frying pan over a medium-high heat. Add the shiitake mushrooms and stir for 2 minutes.
Add the walnuts and garlic to the pan, and stir for 2 minutes. Adjust the heat as needed.
Add the onion, salt, mustard, and apple cider vinegar, and bring to a boil. Remove from the heat.
Slowly stir in the extra-virgin olive oil. Add the baby spinach, toss with hot mushroom mixture until wilted, and season with black pepper. Serve with quinoa, if you wish.
